error_signature: The expression evaluated to a falsy value: a.ok(nodeExists)*
title: IF node evaluates to falsy value
symptom: The IF node fails to execute properly, displaying an error about a falsy value. This prevents the workflow from proceeding as expected.
applies_when: Expression or fixed value is set
not_this_if: The workflow executes without issues after saving and reloading
root_cause: The IF node may not evaluate correctly due to a temporary state or caching issue in the n8n interface. Saving the workflow and reloading the page can refresh the context and resolve the issue.
agent_instruction: Save the workflow and reload the n8n interface to resolve the IF node issue.
